title: Sighișoara, Mureș — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sighișoara, Mureș: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sighișoara is a city in Mureș with a population of 28,102. A UNESCO World Heritage site and one of Europe’s best-preserved medieval Saxon towns, the birthplace of Vlad Țepeș (Dracula), with a stunning citadel.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
